sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.1 Overview
sheet.p: The Theta Chat Bot has been designed using a modular and extensible architecture that supports future enhancements with minimal changes to the existing system. While the initial implementation focuses on delivering accurate website-based responses using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture, the proposed design enables the chatbot to evolve incrementally as business requirements grow.
The roadmap below outlines the planned evolution of the chatbot while maintaining scalability, maintainability, and deployment flexibility.

sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.2 Phase 1 – Initial Production Release (MVP)
sheet.p: The first phase focuses on delivering a production-ready chatbot integrated with the Theta Technolabs website.

ul.li: LLM evaluation and testing (Google Gemini with OpenAI as an alternative if required)
PostgreSQL integration for conversation storage and analytics
pgvector for vector search (if PostgreSQL is selected as the vector database)

sheet.p: Objective: Deliver a production-ready chatbot capable of providing accurate, context-aware responses using the official Theta Technolabs knowledge base while establishing the foundation for future monitoring and analytics.

sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.3 Phase 2 – Monitoring & Analytics
sheet.p: Following the initial deployment, the focus shifts toward improving operational visibility, monitoring, and performance analysis.

ul.li: AI-powered conversation summaries for dashboard insights

sheet.p: Objective: Improve operational monitoring and provide actionable insights into chatbot usage, conversation trends, and overall system performance.

sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.4 Phase 3 – User Experience Enhancements
sheet.p: This phase focuses on enhancing the overall user experience and making interactions more engaging and accessible.
Objective: Improve usability, accessibility, and the overall conversational experience for website visitors.

sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.5 Long-Term Vision
sheet.p: The long-term vision is to continuously enhance the Theta Chat Bot by improving response quality, user experience, and operational efficiency while preserving its modular architecture. Future enhancements will focus on increasing system performance, simplifying maintenance, and supporting evolving business requirements without requiring significant architectural changes.
The modular architecture proposed in this project provides the flexibility to incorporate these enhancements incrementally while maintaining system stability and maintainability.

sheet.label: FUTURE ENHANCEMENTS
sheet.title: 15.6 Roadmap Summary

row.cell: Deploy a production-ready RAG chatbot and establish the core AI platform
Introduce monitoring, dashboards, and operational analytics
Expand the chatbot through continuous improvements and support for future business requirements

sheet.p: The phased roadmap enables incremental development while minimizing implementation risk. Each phase builds upon the existing modular architecture, allowing the Theta Chat Bot to evolve into a scalable, maintainable, and intelligent customer support solution without requiring a complete system redesign.
